name: YNX Developer / YNX AI Build

minOS.windows: x64 WPF host with WebView2 Runtime

installEvidence.result: resource self-test, strict ad-hoc classification, real GUI cold launch, bundled server observation and child cleanup passed
compile, package, resource self-test, WPF cold launch, bundled server observation and child cleanup passed

centralIntegration.walletRegistry: exact ynx-developer-v1 binding is delivered in the handoff but is not merged/deployed centrally
centralIntegration.aiGateway: Developer uses bounded POST-body transport; canonical main remains outside this branch
centralIntegration.walletDeploymentProvider: not present; UI fails closed and never uses a local key or unsigned deploy bypass

knownLimitations: No public Web staging or public deployment URL exists.
No immutable public artifact URL exists; the Windows CI artifact expires after 14 days and the macOS ZIP is local only.
No Developer ID, notarization, Authenticode, signed installer, signed updater or store release exists.
No central Wallet registry/provider integration or real Wallet-signed deployment was performed.
No provider-backed AI generation was performed because no operator provider credential/configuration was supplied.
The optional official Grok Build source was audited and pinned but not built locally because Rust 1.92, Cargo and DotSlash were absent; no upstream binary is bundled.
The pinned chain compiler response truthfully reports deterministic analyzer output unless a matching production solc artifact exists; no arbitrary EVM or remote public verification claim is made.
